<!--
Fill in each section. Keep prose short and scannable. Use plain ASCII punctuation.
Delete this comment before submitting. See CONTRIBUTING.md for the full conventions.
-->

## Why

<!-- The motivation. What problem, user need, or opportunity prompted this change?
     A reviewer who understands the "why" can evaluate the "how" much faster. -->

## What changed

<!-- Summarize the approach and key design decisions, not a file-by-file list.
     "Adds a cache in front of the API client so repeated reads don't hit the network"
     beats "modified api.ts and cache.ts". -->

## Provenance / notes

<!-- Anything a reviewer should know:
     - Source URLs for any factual claims (Microsoft Learn pages must be verified, HTTP 200).
     - Preview / experimental caveats.
     - Trade-offs, follow-ups, or areas that need careful review.
     - If content was ported from elsewhere, say from where and what you preserved/changed. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Title follows Conventional Commits (e.g. `docs: ...`, `feat: ...`).
- [ ] Microsoft Learn references were fetched and returned HTTP 200 (no guessed URLs).
- [ ] Experimental / preview limitations are stated where relevant.
- [ ] `last_updated` bumped on any skill `SKILL.md` I changed.
